description: Reusable structured quality result from a model performance evaluation. Carries an overall score, optional named dimensions, optional latency, and optional evaluator identity.

dimensions.description: Named quality dimensions (e.g., coherence, safety). Same pattern constraint as quality_signal dimensions.

latency_ms.description: End-to-end latency of the evaluated request in milliseconds.

evaluated_by.description: Agent or system that performed the quality evaluation.
